marketSize_JOD.note: Digital fitness growing 10.28% CAGR 2023-2027 per Statista. Physical wellness growing with urban middle class.
marketSize_JOD.aiPromptGuidance: For gym or fitness ideas use gymFitnessStudios_amman. For beauty or salon ideas use beautyWellness_amman. For online coaching use digitalFitness_USD_2027_projected converted at 0.71.

gym_fitness.name: Curves for Women
gym_fitness.locations: Multiple Amman branches including Sweifieh, Khalda, Abdoun
gym_fitness.mainStrength: International franchise brand trust, women-only format, multiple branches

gym_fitness.name: Magma Lifestyle & Fitness Center
gym_fitness.mainStrength: 50+ weekly classes, rooftop track, nutrition services, 30+ trainers

beauty_wellness.name: Indulge Salon
beauty_wellness.type: Premium women's hair and beauty salon
beauty_wellness.mainStrength: Strong brand loyalty, experienced stylists, premium positioning

marketContext.insight: Jordan healthcare is world-class relative to GDP. B2C wellness (fitness, nutrition, mental health) is underserved and growing with urban middle class.
marketContext.digitalHealthGrowing: Tele-dentistry and telehealth startups emerging — digital-first wellness viable
marketContext.womenOnlyOpportunity: Women-only gyms command premium loyalty in Amman. Curves dominates mid-market 30-55 age group; boutique gap exists for ages 20-35.

legalRequirements.medicalClinicLicense: Ministry of Health approval — varies by specialty
legalRequirements.beautyLicense: Municipality license required. Cost varies by Amman district.
legalRequirements.gymLicense_JOD: 500-1500 depending on Amman district and floor area

gym_small.rent_westAmman_note: West Amman (Sweifieh, Khalda, Abdoun) commercial rent for 150-200 sqm is 1200-2000 JOD/month in 2025

monthlyFixedCosts_JOD.staffCosts_note: Female instructor/trainer minimum 470 JOD/month + 67 JOD SSC = 537 JOD total. For 2 staff multiply accordingly.

commonRisks: Medical clinics: first months rarely cover payroll — need JOD 5K-15K working capital reserve
Most wellness is cash-pay — no insurance reimbursement in Jordan
Seasonal gym churn: January spike (resolutions), summer drop (heat and school holidays)
Ministry of Health licensing delays can push launch back 2-4 months
One bad Instagram review can significantly damage reputation in tight Amman community
West Amman commercial rent (Sweifieh, Khalda, Abdoun) rose 25-40% between 2022-2025 — budget 1200-2000 JOD/month for 150-200 sqm

jordanContext.primaryAcquisitionChannel: Word of mouth + Google Maps reviews + Instagram before/after content
jordanContext.womenOnlyNiche: Women-only gyms and salons command premium pricing and strong loyalty in Amman. Curves dominates 30-55 age group but boutique gap exists for 20-35.
